rows.label: tev024601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Lucia about the residential district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Lucia about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Lucia for her opinion of xenoforms.

rows.label: tev024601_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Lucia if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev024601_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Lucia for her opinion of the Bias.

rows.label: tev024601_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Lucia for her opinion of the Nopon.

rows.label: tev024601_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Lucia about the Growth attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Lucia about recent developments.

rows.label: tev024601_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Lucia for her opinion of the Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_SEL1041
rows.name: Ask Lucia about the xenoforms living in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_SEL1051
rows.name: Ask Lucia about recent developments.

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0001
rows.name:
They planned to build apartments in a part
of the district that hasn't been completed
yet, but they haven't made any progress.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0002
rows.name:
That's why we still have multiple
people sharing each of these houses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Some people hate having to live with
strangers, but I think it's fun![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0004
rows.name:
After all, I haven't been able to
make a real family of my own yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0008
rows.name:
I intend to open my home to other
like-minded people who would enjoy
living together with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0009
rows.name:
We'll stay up all night talking,
we'll bake cookies for each
other... It'll be a blast![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0010
rows.name:
The only hard part is finding good
people to share my home with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0013
rows.name:
If you're interested... Too bad! No dudes
allowed! I want it to be a place where we
girls can feel comfortable speaking our minds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0014
rows.name:
I really am sorry about that. If only
you had been a cute girl... But alas![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0017
rows.name:
Hey, what about you? You seem really strong,
and you've got a pleasant vibe about you. I bet
it would be a lot of fun having you around![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0018
rows.name:
...You already have a
home in the BLADE Home?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0019
rows.name:
Aw, that's too bad. But I suppose that's for
the best. I wouldn't want a BLADE parking
her Doll in my front yard, you know? Ha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0025
rows.name:
Xenoforms living with us in
NLA... Can you even IMAGINE?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0026
rows.name:
I bet an influx of xenoforms would
really bring this city to life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0027
rows.name:
You know, I should go recruit some of
the xenoform ladies for my girl's club![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0028
rows.name:
What will I do if the xenoforms don't even
have genders? Hmm... Well, I'll cross that
bridge when I come to it, I guess![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0035
rows.name:
There's an older woman named Wedy who lives
in this neighborhood. She's been complaining
that my Ma-non guests are too loud.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0036
rows.name:
That Chanty will certainly talk
your ear off if you let her, but
her voice isn't what I'd call LOUD.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0037
rows.name:
Okay, so maybe she does squeal a little
when she tries a pizza with toppings
that she's never had before...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0038
rows.name:
Still, this whole thing is just silly.
Wedy should come over and join us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0045
rows.name:
Let me introduce the newest
member of our girl's club— this
is Pear Sloth of the Bias![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0046
rows.name:
When I saw her dancing under the
streetlights at night, I couldn't
help myself—I joined right in![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0047
rows.name:
She said that when she dances in front of men,
they beg her to marry them! And since that's
annoying, she holds one-woman dance parties instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0048
rows.name:
I told her that there were no
men at our place, so she could
come over and dance anytime.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0049
rows.name:
Now it's only the members of our
girl's club that get to watch NLA's
greatest dancer strut her stuff![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0055
rows.name:
Let me introduce you to the
newest member of our girl's
club—this is Pulala of the Nopon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0056
rows.name:
She looked so cute standing there in front
of Mission Control waiting for a BLADE to
help her, so I struck up a conversation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0057
rows.name:
Pulala has the Nopon Commerce Guild
bring us the finest candies and
gourmet sweets in all of Mira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG0058
rows.name:
Am I the only human who's
tried all 10 varieties of
mizaria celery? I may well be![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1001
rows.name:
I'm part of the tech team. I did join the
evacuation, but they had me analyze the
data and prepare a report when I got back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1002
rows.name:
The enemy leader was this really petite girl!
And that squid xeno that attacked BLADE in
Nightglow Forest was a woman too, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1003
rows.name:
Doesn't it seem like there are a
lot of tough girls in the Growth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1004
rows.name:
I wonder if having them come over to talk would be
entirely out of the question? I mean, once they gave
up attacking us and signed a peace treaty, of course.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1009
rows.name:
Maybe it was wrong of me to try to drag
Wedy out of her house like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1010
rows.name:
You see, when we got the order
to evacuate, I tried to force my
neighbor Wedy to come along.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1011
rows.name:
But she said she wouldn't go on the Ma-non
ship. She said that she'd rather be killed by
xenos like her son was than be saved by them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1012
rows.name:
When she said that, even Chanty
was speechless. Maybe I should
have honored her wishes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1013
rows.name:
I only want Wedy to understand that
just because they're xenoforms doesn't
mean they can't be good people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1020
rows.name:
I'd like to introduce you to the
newest member of my girl's club—this
is Gu Ludho of the Larsians![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1021
rows.name:
I found her lost, confused, and at the brink of keeling
over right there on the street. She'd been trying to get
to the administrative district, but ended up here instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1022
rows.name:
She's really strong. Like a ninja! But also kind of
weird. She thought our pool was a bath, and she freaks
out whenever the alarm on a comm device rings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1023
rows.name:
Isn't that adorable?! I used to
think the Larsians were so rigid,
but she's really changed my mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1028
rows.name:
Before I knew what was happening, I found
myself surrounded by xenoform girls![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1029
rows.name:
Chatty Chanty of the Ma-non,
NLA's dancing queen Pear Sloth,
and our Nopon caterer Pulala![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1030
rows.name:
And of course, Gu Ludho, the strong but
skittish Larsian. Together, we're the best
women's social circle in the entire cosmos![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1031
rows.name:
But the more we talk, the more
the name [ST:playername ] comes up. Is that you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1032
rows.name:
Everyone is really grateful for all you've
done. Thanks so much for giving me the opportunity
to enjoy all my new friends like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1037
rows.name:
The girl's club took a vote,
and we decided to invite my
grumpy neighbor Wedy over.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1038
rows.name:
Chanty made a pizza without
burning it, and Pulala hand-picked
the finest Miran delicacies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1039
rows.name:
Wedy just listened to us
talk without saying much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1040
rows.name:
But as she was leaving, she promised
to bring her famous spaghetti and
meatballs the next time she came.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024601_MSG1041
rows.name:
She said it was her son's
favorite. I think she's actually
starting to cheer up a bit![ST:wait ]
